zh.Melcomb, Paulett, Somerset, England: 英國薩默塞特霍爾可姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當William Paulet於1368年7月20日出生在英國薩默塞特霍爾可姆時，他的父親Sir John Paulett II14歲，母親Elizabeth Creedy De La Bere17歲。他和Anna Delamare至少有1個兒子。他去世於1435年8月8日在英國英格蘭薩默塞特享年67歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭薩默塞特努尼。

zh-hans.Melcomb, Paulett, Somerset, England: 英国薩默塞特霍爾可姆
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Paulet于1368年7月20日出生在英国薩默塞特霍爾可姆时，他的父亲Sir John Paulett II14岁，母亲Elizabeth Creedy De La Bere17岁。他和Anna Delamare至少有1个儿子。他去世于1435年8月8日在英国英格兰薩默塞特享年67岁，埋葬在英国英格兰薩默塞特努尼。

nameMeanings.name: Paulet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Spanish: habitational name from any of several places called Paules in the provinces of Zaragoza and Huesca in Aragon, and Albacete.

variants.name: Pavlis
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Greek Despina, Nikolaos, Vasilios.
Greek: from a derivative of the personal name Pavlos (see Paul ), or a shortened form of any of various patronymics derived from this name. Compare Paules and Paulis .
Czech and Slovak (also Pavliš); Croatian (Pavliš): derivative of the personal name Pavel (Slovak commonly Pavol, Croatian commonly Pavao), an equivalent of Paul . Compare Paulis .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When William Paulet was born on 20 July 1368, in Holcombe, Somerset, England, his father, Sir John Paulett II, was 14 and his mother, Elizabeth Creedy De La Bere, was 17. He had at least 1 son with Anna Delamare. He died on 8 August 1435, in Somerset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 67, and was buried in Nunney, Somerset, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Paulet est né le 20 juillet 1368, à Holcombe, Somerset, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Paulett II, avait 14 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Creedy De La Bere, avait 17 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Anna Delamare. Il est décédé le 8 août 1435, à Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 67 ans, et a été enterré à Nunney, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Paulet am 20. Juli 1368 in Holcombe, Somerset, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Paulett II 14 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Creedy De La Bere 17. Er hatte mit Anna Delamare mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 8. August 1435 im Alter von 67 Jahren in Somerset, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Nunney, Somerset, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Paulet è nato il il 20 luglio 1368 nel Holcombe, Somerset, England, il suo padre, Sir John Paulett II, aveva 14 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Creedy De La Bere, aveva 17 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Anna Delamare. Morì il 8 agosto 1435, nel Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 67 anni, e fu sepolto a Nunney, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: William Pauletが1368年7月20日にイギリスソメルセトホールコンベで生まれた時，父Sir John Paulett IIは14歳，母Elizabeth Creedy De La Bereは17歳であった。彼はAnna Delamareとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1435年8月8日にイギリスイギリスソメルセトで67歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスソメルセトヌニーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Paulet(이)가 1368년 7월 20일 영국 서머세트 홀코브에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Paulett II(은)는 14세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Creedy De La Bere(은)는 17세였다. 그는 Anna Delamare(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1435년 8월 8일 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트에서 67세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 누니에 묻혔다.

pt.20 July 1368–8 August 1435: 20 de julho de 1368–8 de agosto de 1435
pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Paulet nasceu em 20 de julho de 1368, em Holcombe, Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Paulett II, tinha 14 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Creedy De La Bere, tinha 17 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Anna Delamare. Ele faleceu em 8 de agosto de 1435, em Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 67 anos, e foi sepultado em Nunney, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Paulet родился 20 июля 1368 г. в местности холкомб, сомирсет, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Paulett II было 14 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Creedy De La Bere, 17. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Anna Delamare. Он умер 8 августа 1435 г. в местности сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 67 лет и был похоронен в местности нунни, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания.

es.20 July 1368–8 August 1435: 20 de julio de 1368–8 de agosto de 1435
es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Paulet nació el 20 de julio de 1368, en Holcombe, Somerset, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John Paulett II, tenía 14 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Creedy De La Bere, tenía 17 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Anna Delamare. Murió el 8 de agosto de 1435, en Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 67 años, y fue sepultado en Nunney, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
